narrative:
Union Township J (precinct in Clermont County) has 784 registered voters, with 58.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.9 percentage points.
